strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong background in scalable systems (handling millions of requests, Kubernetes deployments)
concerns: Limited recent experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
No explicit mention of Vitest (testing framework requirement)
Mostly working in Berlin-based roles; unclear if relocation/remote is feasible
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack skills with TypeScript and Node.js, along with valuable AI-agent experience. However, his recent work lacks direct exposure to Nest.js and Vitest, which are core requirements. His diverse tech stack and problem-solving abilities suggest adaptability, but the missing primary stack pieces are significant concerns.
